Heartbreak.text: The heart was made to be broken.
Heartbreak.author: Oscar Wilde

Heartbreak.text: Each man kills the thing he loves.
Heartbreak.author: Oscar Wilde

Heartbreak.text: When you are in love you cannot fall asleep because reality is better than your dreams.
Heartbreak.author: Oscar Wilde

Heartbreak.text: Some cause happiness wherever they go; others whenever they go.
Heartbreak.author: Oscar Wilde

Heartbreak.text: Some love too much, others not enough.
Heartbreak.author: Oscar Wilde

Heartbreak.text: some people leave and take a version of you with them.
Heartbreak.author: parlé

Heartbreak.text: you don't miss them. you miss who you were when you were with them.
Heartbreak.author: parlé

Heartbreak.text: the worst part isn't that it ended. it's that it felt so real while it lasted.
Heartbreak.author: parlé

Heartbreak.text: loving someone who doesn't choose you back is its own kind of exhausting.
Heartbreak.author: parlé

Heartbreak.text: you can know it's over and still grieve it. those aren't contradictions.
Heartbreak.author: parlé

Heartbreak.text: the silence after them is louder than anything they ever said.
Heartbreak.author: parlé

Heartbreak.text: it wasn't nothing. even if it ended like it was.
Heartbreak.author: parlé

Heartbreak.text: being left without an explanation is a specific kind of hurt.
Heartbreak.author: parlé

Healing.text: Where there is sorrow there is holy ground.
Healing.author: Oscar Wilde

Healing.text: To love oneself is the beginning of a lifelong romance.
Healing.author: Oscar Wilde

Healing.text: A man cannot be too careful in the choice of his enemies.
Healing.author: Oscar Wilde

Healing.text: We are all in the gutter, but some of us are looking at the stars.
Healing.author: Oscar Wilde

Healing.text: Keep love in your heart. A life without it is like a sunless garden when the flowers are dead.
Healing.author: Oscar Wilde

Healing.text: healing isn't linear. some days you're fine. some days a song destroys you.
Healing.author: parlé

Healing.text: you're allowed to be sad about something you chose to walk away from.
Healing.author: parlé

Healing.text: getting better doesn't mean forgetting. it means carrying it differently.
Healing.author: parlé

Healing.text: one okay day doesn't mean you're healed. it just means today was okay.
Healing.author: parlé

Healing.text: you don't have to be over it to be moving through it.
Healing.author: parlé

Healing.text: rest is part of it. you don't have to be productive with your pain.
Healing.author: parlé

Healing.text: some days the most you can do is get through the day. that counts.
Healing.author: parlé

Self-Worth.text: To live is the rarest thing in the world. Most people exist, that is all.
Self-Worth.author: Oscar Wilde

Self-Worth.text: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
Self-Worth.author: Oscar Wilde

Self-Worth.text: I have the simplest tastes. I am always satisfied with the best.
Self-Worth.author: Oscar Wilde

Self-Worth.text: Selfishness is not living as one wishes to live, it is asking others to live as one wishes to live.
Self-Worth.author: Oscar Wilde

Self-Worth.text: you were enough before them and you're enough after.
Self-Worth.author: parlé

Self-Worth.text: someone not seeing your value doesn't change what you're worth.
Self-Worth.author: parlé

Self-Worth.text: you don't need to shrink yourself to fit somewhere you're not wanted.
Self-Worth.author: parlé

Self-Worth.text: being chosen inconsistently is still being unchosen.
Self-Worth.author: parlé

Self-Worth.text: you stopped being yourself trying to keep them. that's the real loss.
Self-Worth.author: parlé

Self-Worth.text: you deserved someone who didn't make you question if you were too much.
Self-Worth.author: parlé

Self-Worth.text: the way they treated you was about them. not about what you're worth.
Self-Worth.author: parlé

Self-Worth.text: you don't have to earn love. that's not how it's supposed to work.
Self-Worth.author: parlé

Letting Go.text: No man is rich enough to buy back his past.
Letting Go.author: Oscar Wilde

Letting Go.text: Some cause happiness wherever they go; others whenever they go.
Letting Go.author: Oscar Wilde

Letting Go.text: Experience is merely the name men give to their mistakes.
Letting Go.author: Oscar Wilde

Letting Go.text: The truth is rarely pure and never simple.
Letting Go.author: Oscar Wilde

Letting Go.text: Nothing that one ignores is ever wholly lost to one.
Letting Go.author: Oscar Wilde

Letting Go.text: letting go doesn't mean you stop caring. it means you stop waiting.
Letting Go.author: parlé

Letting Go.text: you can love someone and still accept that they're not for you.
Letting Go.author: parlé

Letting Go.text: releasing them doesn't mean what you had wasn't real.
Letting Go.author: parlé

Letting Go.text: some chapters end without closure. you write the ending yourself.
Letting Go.author: parlé

Letting Go.text: holding on was an act of love. letting go is too.
Letting Go.author: parlé

Letting Go.text: you can miss someone and still know you're better without them.
Letting Go.author: parlé

Letting Go.text: it's okay to grieve something that wasn't good for you.
Letting Go.author: parlé

Letting Go.text: the door closing doesn't mean you were wrong to have opened it.
Letting Go.author: parlé

Moving On.text: Every saint has a past, and every sinner has a future.
Moving On.author: Oscar Wilde

Moving On.text: The world is a stage, but the play is badly cast.
Moving On.author: Oscar Wilde

Moving On.text: The only way to get rid of temptation is to yield to it… I can resist everything except temptation.
Moving On.author: Oscar Wilde

Moving On.text: There is only one thing in the world worse than being talked about, and that is not being talked about.
Moving On.author: Oscar Wilde

Moving On.text: We live in an age when unnecessary things are our only necessities.
Moving On.author: Oscar Wilde

Moving On.text: moving on doesn't mean you're over it. it means you're choosing yourself.
Moving On.author: parlé

Moving On.text: one day you'll tell this story without it breaking your voice.
Moving On.author: parlé

Moving On.text: you won't always feel this way. that's not a promise. it's just true.
Moving On.author: parlé

Moving On.text: the next version of you was built partly from this.
Moving On.author: parlé

Moving On.text: starting over isn't failure. it's just a different beginning.
Moving On.author: parlé

Moving On.text: you'll love again. differently. maybe better.
Moving On.author: parlé

Moving On.text: the fact that you're still here means something.
Moving On.author: parlé

Moving On.text: one day this will just be something that happened. not everything that defines you.
Moving On.author: parlé
